title: Hot Toys Venom — arm reassembly
description: Reassembly rescue! 🕷️ Hot Toys Venom (Marvel's Spider-Man 2, VGM59) — both arms detached, nothing broken. Shoulder sockets recede when you push, so ball joints won't seat. I stabilized each socket with tools and seated both arms after several tries. Skill, patience, right tools — no parts replaced, display-ready! 🛠️
itemDetails: Hot Toys Marvel's Spider-Man 2 Venom 1/6th scale collectible figure (VGM59). Game-accurate bulky sculpt (~53 cm / 20.8 in tall for 1/6 scale), textured skin, white spider emblem on chest and back, three interchangeable head sculpts, symbiote tendril accessories. Original retail roughly USD 460 / AUD 780; secondary market often USD 430–550 depending on condition and completeness (eBay/collector market — varies).
repairDetails: Client report: both arms detached from the body; no broken parts, unable to reattach at home. Issue: arm sockets in the torso are movable — when pressing the ball joint into the body, the socket recesses and the ball joint stud is not long enough to engage before the socket moves away. Repair: use tools to hold/stabilise each socket in the body while aligning and pressing the ball joint; multiple attempts per arm until both joints seated successfully. No replacement parts; reassembly only.
